# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: masteruser
      MasterUserPassword: password
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt 'SG.DBSecurityGroup.GroupId'

  SG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: RDS Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc123
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: mykey
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - Description: Primary private IP
          DeviceIndex: 0
          GroupSet:
            - !GetAtt 'SG.DBSecurityGroup.GroupId'
          SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: myloadbalancer
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - TargetGroupArn: !GetAtt 'TargetGroup.TargetGroupArn'
          Type: forward
      LoadBalancerArn: !GetAtt 'LoadBalancer.LoadBalancerArn'
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: mybucket
